assessment.note: Names a specific absence — substantive feedback on key decisions — which signals low priority clarity, mild disengagement, and some ongoing strain; also suggests manager-support friction.

new_queue.label: Decision feedback
new_queue.name: Substantive feedback on key decisions — what's missing from it right now?
new_queue.description: Drills into the feedback gap Lin named to locate whether the issue is speed, quality, or decision alignment.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would actually be useful from me over the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Gets concrete about the manager support Lin wants without assuming the answer.

new_queue.label: Next-two-weeks
new_queue.name: Given what we've talked about, where do you want to focus first in the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Closes by landing on a concrete commitment for the next check-in window.
